message:
feat(wa-core): add web interface module and expand CLI commands

Introduces a web-based interface for wezterm_automata and extends
the CLI with new capabilities.

## Web Interface Module (New)
- Add crates/wa-core/src/web.rs entry point
- Add crates/wa-core/src/web/ directory with handlers
- Add crates/wa-core/tests/web.rs integration tests
- HTTP server for remote session management
- REST API for session queries and control
- WebSocket support for real-time updates

## Distributed Module Improvements (+52/-28 lines)
- Refactor leader election logic for better reliability
- Improve conflict resolution strategies
- Add timeout handling for network partitions

## CLI Expansion (+69 lines in main.rs)
- Add web server subcommand for starting HTTP interface
- Add remote control commands for distributed setups
- Improve command-line help documentation

## Dependencies
- Add web server dependencies to Cargo.toml
- Update Cargo.lock with new crate versions

## Documentation
- Update README.md with web interface section
- Update cli-reference.md with new commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
